phase_name: Interactive run visualizations (3 phases) + dashboard header cleanup
status: shipped to prod — paused, one open offer
branch: feature/ui-guide-tooltips-notebook-demo (off main; tip 4f81d6c; committed, NOT pushed)

completed_tasks.name: Resumed via /gsd-resume-work; reviewed all 8 live routes (Playwright vs prod)
Applied user copy edits to landing + guide; fixed a JSX build break (raw '-->' -> '→'); deployed
Fixed workbench concept-list overflow (card was a block div; made it flex flex-col overflow-hidden + shrink-0 header)

VIZ PHASE 1 — interactive charts: Sankey hover-highlight + branded tooltip; bar/histogram branded tooltip + legend; heatmap row/col cross-highlight + readout; new lib/chart.ts shared palette; token-backed grid/axis (dark-mode). Also FIXED a latent Sankey crash (space-joined map keys vs space-containing dest names -> undefined link target).

VIZ PHASE 2 — brushing & linking: one shared Focus (verdict|cohort) in lib/chart; click any chart element (Sankey node/flow, bar/legend, coverage row, heatmap label, atlas series) -> filters review queue + emphasizes across all charts; focus bar w/ count + Clear; queue Select synced. Replaced the old verdict-only queue filter.

VIZ PHASE 3 — embedding atlas instrument: color-by toggle (cohort<->verdict), drag-to-zoom + Reset, click a point -> workbench deep-link (?c=<recordId>, workbench preselects). Points map to concepts via cohort:variable == member; single Scatter + per-point <Cell>. Rewrote seed _atlas to member-key points + regenerated result-sample-*.json so the preview actually demonstrates it.

Dashboard header cleanup + export tooltips: clean single-line title (badge moved to a meta line: mode · desc · cohorts), Review-workbench CTA top-right, 5 downloads moved into a labeled 'Export' strip filling the dead band, each with a radix info tooltip describing its contents.

remaining_tasks.name: OPEN OFFER (user asked what 'split-aware' means): surface a short definition in the UI — info tooltip on the 'Split-aware CDE harmonization run' dashboard subtitle and/or a sentence in the Guide. Appears in AppShell.tsx:50 (topbar tagline) + dashboard.tsx:117 (subtitle). Explanation given verbally; NOT yet built — awaiting user go-ahead.
Push feature/ui-guide-tooltips-notebook-demo + open a ddharmon-ui PR (decision on file: NO core Phenome-Health/ddharmon PR). Standing task 8, gated on team feedback.
OPTIONAL: swap topbar circos PhenomeChip -> official PH icon (user offered previously, deferred).
OPTIONAL: Yang 2024 -> TACL DOI; decide Mimno 2011 / Newman 2010 (no DOI).
(v3) real demo precompute: scripts/build_demos.py --mode sync + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

human_actions_pending.action: Answer the open offer: want the 'split-aware' explainer wired into the UI (subtitle tooltip + Guide line)?
human_actions_pending.context: user asked the meaning; I explained verbally and offered to surface it

human_actions_pending.action: Gather team feedback on https://ddharmon.netlify.app/ ; then decide whether to push the branch + open the ddharmon-ui PR
human_actions_pending.context: the whole v1.1-v1.3 arc is live for the team but the branch is local-only

decisions.decision: Deploy each viz phase to prod immediately (phases 1/2/3 + header) rather than batching
decisions.rationale: team preview stays current; deploy-preview.sh now typecheck-gates so a bad build aborts before upload

decisions.decision: One shared Focus model (verdict|cohort) lives in lib/chart.ts; dashboard owns the state and passes focus/onFocus to every chart. Replaced the queue's verdict-only Select-filter.
decisions.rationale: single source of truth for brushing-and-linking; net simplification

decisions.decision: Atlas point click opens the workbench via ?c=<recordId> deep link (not inline queue expand)
decisions.rationale: workbench is the richest destination (candidates + transforms) and sidesteps the filtered-queue-hides-target problem

decisions.decision: Rewrote seed._atlas to place one point per real member (member-keyed) + regenerated the two static fixtures
decisions.rationale: synthetic v0..vN points didn't map to any concept, so verdict-color + click-through couldn't demonstrate in the preview

decisions.decision: Verdict focus leaves the atlas dimming per-point (via <Cell>); cross-axis focus still dims correctly
decisions.rationale: single Scatter + Cell gives per-point color/opacity that recharts series-level fillOpacity can't

next_action: Nothing forced. On resume: (1) if the user wants it, wire the 'split-aware' explainer (radix Tooltip on the dashboard subtitle 'Split-aware CDE harmonization run' + a Guide sentence) — same pattern as the export tooltips; (2) otherwise, push the branch + open the ddharmon-ui PR after team feedback. Redeploy any change with ./scripts/deploy-preview.sh (typecheck-gated; add --draft for a non-prod preview).
context_notes: Session arc: resume -> live review -> copy edits + deploy-script hardening + workbench bugfix -> user learned the self-serve '!'-prefix deploy -> then a 3-phase run-visualization buildout (interactive charts -> brushing&linking -> atlas instrument) each committed+deployed -> header cleanup + export tooltips. The run dashboard went from static display to a linked interactive analysis surface. Last exchange: explained 'split-aware' (the LLM split step partitions a coarse cluster into distinct-concept groups before CDE assignment; contrast dropped geometric recursion) and offered to surface it in the UI. All 8 commits on feature/ui-guide-tooltips-notebook-demo (tip 4f81d6c), all live on prod, branch never pushed. No servers running.
